points.title: Nine Arch Bridge
points.description: Iconic colonial railway viaduct offering spectacular photography opportunities and train spotting experiences.

points.title: Little Adam's Peak
points.description: Accessible mountain hike with panoramic views perfect for sunrise photography and nature observation.

points.title: Ravana Falls
points.description: Magnificent 25-meter waterfall with mythological significance and ancient cave complex exploration.

points.title: Ella Rock Summit
points.description: Challenging hike to dramatic viewpoint offering unparalleled panoramic mountain and valley vistas.

points.title: Dhowa Rock Temple
points.description: Ancient Buddhist temple with 2,000-year history featuring remarkable rock-carved Buddha statue.

points.title: Tea Factory Tours
points.description: Working plantation visits offering authentic tea production experiences and cultural exchanges.

points.title: Scenic Railway Experience
points.description: World-famous train journey through misty mountains offering constantly changing panoramic views.
